_note: Curated baseline. These events ALWAYS merge into events-data.json. The weekly web harvester can ADD events to the calendar but can NEVER delete anything listed here. Put events you know are real but that a one-shot web search may miss: recurring seasonal series, club events posted only on a club's own calendar, etc. Recurring rows persist until season_end. Dated rows drop automatically after they pass, so refresh a dated annual entry (like the Home Tour) once a year, or let the harvester pick up the next year's date on its own.

events.title: Live music Sundays at Schooners

events.summary: Free live music on the oceanfront patio on Sunday evenings through October.
